12.ai_generated_sql: SELECT `carrier` AS '快递公司', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'pending' THEN 1 END) AS '待处理', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'picked_up' THEN 1 END) AS '已取件', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'in_transit' THEN 1 END) AS '运输中', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) AS '已签收', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'failed' THEN 1 END) AS '失败', COUNT(CASE WHEN `status` = 'returned' THEN 1 END) AS '已退回' FROM `shipments` GROUP BY `carrier`

13.ai_generated_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`orders`.`create_time`, '%Y-%m') AS `月份`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `待支付订单数`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已支付订单数`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'shipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已发货订单数`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'received' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已完成订单数`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'refunding' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `退款中订单数`, SUM(CASE WHEN `orders`.`order_status` = 'refunded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `已退款订单数` FROM `orders` WHERE `orders`.`order_status` != 'cancelled' GROUP BY `月份` ORDER BY `月份`
13.ai_explanation: 按月统计各订单状态的订单数量，将订单状态转换为列展示。使用DATE_FORMAT提取月份，通过CASE WHEN实现行转列，过滤已取消订单，按月份排序。
